content.en:
Whoa!!!

The top 100 gods and generals were moved out of the ancestral monument space one by one.

Originally, they were in the process of cultivating, but they were suddenly moved out, and these gods and generals sighed one after another, lamenting that there was too little time.

If they could, they would even want to cultivate in the ancestral monument space for hundreds of millions of years, but that would obviously be impossible.

After the top 100 gods and generals on the god generals list came out, they looked at the god generals list on the ancestral tablet, and the rankings on the top list had changed greatly.

Originally, the Immortal God General had always been ranked first, but now it was only ranked fourth.

At this time, the Immortal God General was still at the peak of the Seven Stars God General, and it was obvious that in the tens of thousands of years of the ancestral tablet space, he still hadn't broken the shackles, which showed that he had reached the limit and couldn't improve anymore.

Everyone can see that the lifeless god will be lonely.

Many gods and generals know more about the inactive gods, this is an ancient god general, who has lived for a long time, and it can even be said that his lifespan is not very long.

This time he entered the big universe, and it was already a good improvement to be promoted from the late stage of the Seven Stars to the peak of the Seven Stars, but unfortunately he couldn't continue to improve.

Of course, compared to 10,000 years ago, the strength of the lifeless god general has still improved a lot, after all, the seven-star peak god general and the seven-star peak god general are not exactly the same.

Even if the strength of an ordinary seven-star peak god is more than doubled, it is still a seven-star peak, and it cannot be compared with an eight-star god at all.

The three god generals in front of the lifeless god generals are all eight-star god generals, and the first one of them is the god general who was in the top few before - Chen Jing God General.

The god general who ranks second is the sword desolate god general, and it is worth mentioning that he has always been the second god general on the list of god generals, and he is very stable.

The third-ranked god general is the Sun Shooting God General, a God General who focuses on archery, this is a relatively young God General, and his strength has been improving rapidly, among so many God Generals, his talent is second only to Yun Zi Divine Maiden.

And this time, he didn't disappoint, and in one fell swoop, he was promoted to the combat power of the eight-star early stage god general, and there was still potential to be tapped.

Yun Zi Divine Maiden took a look at the list of divine generals, and saw that Ye Tian was ahead of her and had surpassed her, and she was suddenly a little stunned and incredible.

She knew that she had greatly improved in the ancestral monument space, and she could even be described as reborn, but even so, she was still surpassed by Ye Tian.

She remembered that before entering the ancestral monument space, she was ranked 32nd on the Divine Generals List, while Ye Tian was ranked 94th.

Today, she is ranked 20th and Ye Tian is ranked 19th.

What a terrible uplift!

If you can become a seven-star god general, there is no waste, they are all genius-like characters, and after entering the seven-star god general, every step of improvement is extremely difficult, but Ye Tian has improved so much, it is simply unreasonable.

"The Ten Thousand Laws Daozi is worthy of being accepted as a personal disciple by the Dao Ancestor before he is detached, and his talent is really powerful!"

The Yunzi Divine Maiden praised.

"The Cloud Purple Divine Maiden praised it falsely, a temporary transcendence is nothing, with the talent of the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden, maybe she will surpass me again soon!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

"Really?"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden smiled.

It can be guessed from the laughter that she is still very confident in herself, and she does not feel that Ye Tian has really surpassed herself.

Subsequently, a famous god will leave the place.

And Ye Tian also returned to the Void Heaven Palace.

As soon as they returned to the Void Heaven Palace, a large number of god-level disciples looked at Ye Tian with adoring eyes, and in their opinion, Ye Tian's strength had improved too quickly.

It's only been a long time, Ye Tian has entered the top 20 of the god general list, if Ye Tian is given more time, wouldn't he be able to become the first on the god general list?

"Hahaha, congratulations to Wanfa Daozi for becoming the 19th on the list of divine generals, which has greatly increased the prestige of our Void Heaven Temple!"

Peng Yu Tianjun appeared and congratulated.

"Senior Brother Pengyu is polite!"

Ye Tian still called Pengyu Tianjun in the name of his senior brother, and Pengyu Tianjun hurriedly said that he didn't dare, but Ye Tian did not change.

After all, he is a god general, and Pengyu Tianjun is the real Tianjun, and he is extremely powerful among Tianjun, he doesn't dare to really put his position above Pengyu Tianjun.

Void Heaven Temple, hall.

Ye Tian communicated with Peng Yu Tianjun and several other Heavenly Monarchs.

Suddenly, Ye Tian opened his mouth and asked, "Senior brothers, do you know how to obtain the Chaos Divine Power Inheritance?"

"Chaos Divine Power?" Peng Yu Tianjun was surprised, and said: "Daozi, we have a lot of Chaos Divine Powers in the Void Heaven Lineage, but this is not the Void Heaven Realm, if you want to obtain the Chaos Divine Power inheritance, it will be a little troublesome." And I don't recommend Daozi to study the Chaos Divine Power, the cultivation of the Chaos Divine Power is too difficult, and Daozi should have obtained one or two Chaos Divine Powers from Shizun, there is no need to learn other Chaos Divine Powers, so as not to delay the time. "

The Black Armor Heavenly Monarch also spoke: "Daozi, with your talent, you can easily be promoted to an eight-star divine general, or even a nine-star divine general, if you go to study the Chaos Divine Power, to find the treasure to improve the talent and the fusion talent, the long years may not be able to meet the conditions for cultivating the Chaos Divine Power, and the long years are wasted." Under the sect of Shizun, there was a Daozi who was obsessed with the Chaos Divine Power in the distant era, but the final achievement was not as good as the top formal disciple, and the Daozi could not waste time on the Chaos Divine Power. "

Seeing the dissuasion of several Heavenly Monarchs, Ye Tian said with a smile: "Senior brothers, everyone has their own path to take, and my path has been determined, and Shizun also agreed with me to study and cultivate Chaos Divine Power, but I can't take the initiative to contact Shizun, and everything needs to be on my own, so I can only rely on myself to find Chaos Divine Power." "

Ye Tian said this, and several Heavenly Monarchs naturally stopped dissuading him.

Peng Yu Tianjun said: "Daozi, I have a Chaos Divine Power inheritance on my body, but I don't have a corresponding innate origin thing. But the inheritance value of this Chaos Divine Power is very high, and if Daozi wants it, he must come up with a certain value. "

The other Heavenly Monarchs shook their heads, indicating that they did not have Chaos Divine Powers.

After all, they knew that they couldn't practice the Chaos Divine Power, so naturally there was no need to collect the Chaos Divine Power, and the Chaos Divine Power inheritance of the Void Heaven One Vein could not be taught, which meant that there was none.

"Senior Brother Pengyu, what is the Chaos Divine Power in your hand?"

Ye Tian asked.

"One of the three thousand chaotic supernatural powers, the three thousand thunder supernatural powers ranked 1029th, is a body magic power, suitable for combat, but not very suitable for a long time. "

Pengyu Tianjun said.

When Ye Tian heard this, he was immediately overjoyed, this was indeed the kind of chaotic supernatural power he wanted!

After talking to Peng Yu Tianjun, he learned that this three thousand thunder magic powers contained the Great Dao of Thunder and the Great Dao of Speed, and thunder was one of the avenues of the twelve attributes.

Although Ye Tian wanted to condense the Endless Dao, he still used the Twelve Attribute Dao as the foundation, and then slowly condensed the prototype of the other Dao, and the Thunder Dao Prototype was fully qualified as the prototype of the third Great Dao.

The only problem now is how to trade this Chaos Divine Power from Peng Yu Tianjun.
